post.summary: CreateExchangeRate defines a governance operation for creating an exchange rate.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: MsgCreateExchangeRate is the Msg/CreateExchangeRate request type.

post.summary:
GrantExchangeRateAuthorization defines a governance operation authorizing an
operator to update a given exchange rate. [MOD-XR-MSG-4]

RevokeExchangeRateAuthorization defines a governance operation revoking an
operator's authorization for a given exchange rate. [MOD-XR-MSG-5]
SetExchangeRateState defines a governance operation for enabling or disabling an exchange rate.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: MsgSetExchangeRateState is the Msg/SetExchangeRateState request type.

post.summary: UpdateExchangeRate defines an operator operation for updating an exchange rate.

UpdateParams defines a (governance) operation for updating the module
parameters. The authority defaults to the x/gov module account.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: MsgUpdateParams is the Msg/UpdateParams request type.

verana.cs.v1.PricingAssetType.description:
- PRICING_ASSET_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED: Default to prevent accidental omission
 - TU: Trust Unit (non-transferable token for fee definitions)
 - COIN: Native blockchain token or IBC asset
 - FIAT: Fiat currency (off-chain settlement)
verana.cs.v1.PricingAssetType.title: PricingAssetType defines the type of asset used for paying business fees

authority.description: authority is the address that controls the module (defaults to x/gov unless overwritten).

verana.xr.v1.MsgCreateExchangeRate.description: MsgCreateExchangeRate is the Msg/CreateExchangeRate request type.

verana.xr.v1.MsgCreateExchangeRateRespon.description: MsgCreateExchangeRateResponse defines the response for MsgCreateExchangeRate.

authority.description: authority is the gov module account.

xr_id.description: xr_id is the exchange rate the operator is authorized to update.

operator.description: operator is the account authorized to update the exchange rate.

expiration.description: expiration is when the authorization expires (must be in the future).

min_interval.description: min_interval is the minimum time between successful updates (optional anti-spam).

max_deviation_bps.description: max_deviation_bps is the max allowed rate change in basis points, (0, 10000] (optional circuit breaker).

verana.xr.v1.MsgGrantExchangeRateAuthori.title: MsgGrantExchangeRateAuthorization is the Msg/GrantExchangeRateAuthorization request type. [MOD-XR-MSG-4]

verana.xr.v1.MsgGrantExchangeRateAuthori.description: MsgGrantExchangeRateAuthorizationResponse defines the response for MsgGrantExchangeRateAuthorization.

authority.description: authority is the gov module account.

xr_id.description: xr_id is the exchange rate the authorization is for.

operator.description: operator is the account whose authorization is revoked.

verana.xr.v1.MsgRevokeExchangeRateAuthor.title: MsgRevokeExchangeRateAuthorization is the Msg/RevokeExchangeRateAuthorization request type. [MOD-XR-MSG-5]

authority.description: authority is the address that controls the module (defaults to x/gov unless overwritten).

id.description: id is the exchange rate entry to toggle.

state.description: state is the desired state: true for enabled, false for disabled.

verana.xr.v1.MsgSetExchangeRateState.description: MsgSetExchangeRateState is the Msg/SetExchangeRateState request type.

verana.xr.v1.MsgSetExchangeRateStateResp.description: MsgSetExchangeRateStateResponse defines the response for MsgSetExchangeRateState.

operator.description: operator is the authorized operator executing this message.

id.description: id is the exchange rate entry to update.

rate.description: rate is the new exchange rate value.

verana.xr.v1.MsgUpdateExchangeRate.title: MsgUpdateExchangeRate is the Msg/UpdateExchangeRate request type. [MOD-XR-MSG-2]

verana.xr.v1.MsgUpdateExchangeRateRespon.description: MsgUpdateExchangeRateResponse defines the response for MsgUpdateExchangeRate.

authority.description: authority is the address that controls the module (defaults to x/gov unless overwritten).

params.description:
params defines the module parameters to update.

NOTE: All parameters must be supplied.

verana.xr.v1.MsgUpdateParams.description: MsgUpdateParams is the Msg/UpdateParams request type.

verana.xr.v1.MsgUpdateParamsResponse.description:
MsgUpdateParamsResponse defines the response structure for executing a
MsgUpdateParams message.

max_validity_duration.description: max_validity_duration is the maximum allowed validity duration for an exchange rate.

verana.xr.v1.Params.description: Params defines the parameters for the module.
